title: FeedConfig.poll_interval is a String that is re-parsed on every interval() call
description: config::FeedConfig stores poll_interval as String and FeedConfig::interval() calls parse_duration() each time it is called — with an .expect() that relies on config validation having run. The interval is a config-time constant; it should be parsed once at load time and stored as Duration (or a validated newtype). The current pattern means: (a) if validate() is somehow bypassed, interval() panics at runtime rather than load time; (b) parse_duration() is called in a hot path (called once per polling loop iteration); (c) the invariant 'validated on load' exists only as a comment, not as a type guarantee.
close_reason: Accepted: ponytail comment. Parse is trivial, no regex.
